long_profile_retrieval.evidence: Long profile rendered 11 sector endpoints with eight observations per eligible tail

long_leading_filter.evidence: 1 point shown / 1 label shown / Leading filter / 10 filtered

short_profile_retrieval.evidence: Short profile explanation and 11 sector endpoints rendered

profile_controls_are_explicit.evidence: Short, Medium, Long controls and not-simple-return-windows disclosure rendered

axis_names.evidence: Relative Trend horizontal axis and Relative Momentum vertical axis rendered

indicator_explanation.evidence: Benchmark-relative trend and momentum-of-relative-trend explanation rendered

chronological_tails.evidence: Eight or ten fading connected observations and emphasized endpoints rendered per sector according to profile policy

current_point_inspector.evidence: Inspector used Relative Trend, Relative Momentum, Medium profile, direction, and SPY benchmark terminology

web_render.evidence: 1280 x 720 viewport displayed chart geometry, tails, filters, axes, and counts without horizontal overflow

n_a_at_zero.evidence: No unavailable coordinate rendered at an axis zero

proprietary_claims_absent.evidence: No prohibited proprietary indicator name or third-party equivalence claim rendered

visible_runtime_errors.evidence: No loading, failed, or error state was visible across profile and filter interactions

mobile_viewport.reason: The managed in-app browser for this acceptance session exposed a fixed 1280 x 720 viewport and no viewport-resize control; no mobile claim is made.

notes: Visual acceptance used the live local API backed by the published immutable sector snapshot, not test-scenario fixtures.
Clockwise motion was not required or forced; the rendered real tails include reversals, stalls, and different directions.
This artifact is local visual acceptance, not production monitoring evidence or physical-device certification.
